observed_outcome.main_success_signal: training return improved to 4.667, partial_progress count recovered to 50 in elite evaluation

failure_repair_outcome.failure_before: partial_progress generation dropped to 14, low_progress_survival dominated candidate's own training, gated_timeout_penalty still penalized some partial_progress
failure_repair_outcome.repair_attempt: local_repair tuning of gated_timeout_penalty and gated_failure_penalty thresholds, removal of crash_penalty, stability_penalty, terminal_failure_penalty, and timeout_penalty; preservation of approach_progress and near_stage_stability
failure_repair_outcome.outcome_after: partial_progress restored to 50 in both memory and training, training return improved from 0.51 to 4.67, but no success_like trajectories emerged; component alignment for terminal bonuses (intermediate_safe_bonus, safe_landing_bonus) remains near zero

lesson: Local_repair that removes multiple penalty components and tunes gated thresholds can recover partial_progress and improve training return, but terminal bonuses still lack alignment with success-like behavior; bridging to success requires progressive shaping of terminal conditions, not just penalty adjustments.
future_guidance: preserve approach_progress and near_stage_stability as core drivers of partial_progress
restructure terminal bonuses (safe_landing_bonus, intermediate_safe_bonus) with progressive thresholds that become more stringent as the lander approaches the goal
ensure gated_timeout_penalty only applies to trajectories with negligible progress to avoid penalizing partial_progress
avoid removing components that directly reward progress (e.g., approach_progress) or stability near pad
consider adding a continuous terminal reward that activates when the lander is close and stable, rather than discrete thresholds

archive_update.reason: Selected candidate has highest TAGE score (0.749) and training return improvement; added to elite archive; rollback conditions not met.

uncertainties: No high-confidence success_like trajectories exist, so success-level preferences cannot be constructed
Decision level remains weak_pairwise_selection; all conclusions are tentative and may not generalize to success behavior
Component alignment for terminal bonuses (intermediate_safe_bonus, safe_landing_bonus) is zero, indicating these components may not be firing or are misaligned with desired behavior
